title: Croatian Cassava Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with cassava and spices, served with a side of tangy aioli. This dish is a staple in Croatian cuisine.

ingredients.name: croatian seasoning
ingredients.notes: A blend of spices and herbs for authentic flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated cassava, shredded cheese, beaten eggs, and Croatian seasoning.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the cassava mixture into the hot oil.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with a side of tangy aioli for dipping.
